zh.lifeSummary: 當Margareta von Geldern於1290年出生在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德時，她的父親Rainald I von Geldern35歲，母親Marguerite de Flandres25歲。她於1308年與Dietrich IX. von Kleve結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1333年6月29日在海因里希_海普洛文次可列福享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margareta von Geldern于1290年出生在荷兰蓋爾德藍德时，她的父亲Rainald I von Geldern35岁，母亲Marguerite de Flandres25岁。她于1308年与Dietrich IX. von Kleve结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1333年6月29日在海因里希_海普洛文次可列福享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Geldern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northern England usually a variant of Geldard, an occupational name from Middle English gelde ‘sterile, barren’, used as a noun to denote ‘gelded cattle’, + Old English hierde, hence ‘herdman who tends the gelded cattle’.
English: alternatively, perhaps an occupational name from Middle English gelder(e) ‘gelder, castrator (of livestock)’.

variants.name: Gilder
meanings: English (Essex and Middlesex): occupational name for a goldsmith or gilder, from Middle English gilder, gelder, guldar, a derivative of Old English gyldan ‘to gild’.

nameMeanings.name: Margareta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margrethe
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margareta von Geldern was born in 1290, in Zutphen, Gelderland, Netherlands, her father, Rainald I von Geldern, was 35 and her mother, Marguerite de Flandres, was 25. She married Dietrich IX. von Kleve in 1308. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died on 29 June 1333, in Kleve, Rhineland, Prussia, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margareta von Geldern est née en 1290, à Zutphen, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, son père, Rainald I von Geldern, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Flandres, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Dietrich IX. von Kleve en 1308. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 juin 1333, à Kleve, Rhénanie, Prusse, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margareta von Geldern 1290 in Zutphen, Geldern, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rainald I von Geldern 35 und ihre Mutter Marguerite de Flandres 25. Sie hat 1308 Dietrich IX. von Kleve geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 29. Juni 1333 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margareta von Geldern è nata il nel 1290 nel Zutphen, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Rainald I von Geldern, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Marguerite de Flandres, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Dietrich IX. von Kleve nel 1308. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 29 giugno 1333, nel Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margareta von Geldernが1290年にオランダジェルダーランドズトフンで生まれた時，父Rainald I von Geldernは35歳，母Marguerite de Flandresは25歳であった。1308年にDietrich IX. von Kleveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1333年6月29日にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズクレブで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margareta von Geldern(이)가 1290년 네덜란드 글델랜드 주트프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rainald I von Geldern(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite de Flandres(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1308년 Dietrich IX. von Kleve(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1333년 6월 29일 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 클브에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margareta von Geldern nasceu em 1290, em Zutphen, Gheldria, Países Baixos, seu pai, Rainald I von Geldern, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Flandres, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Dietrich IX. von Kleve em 1308. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de junho de 1333, em Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margareta von Geldern родилась в 1290 г. в местности зутфен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Rainald I von Geldern было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Flandres, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Dietrich IX. von Kleve в 1308 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла 29 июня 1333 г. в местности клив, раинпровинз, Пруссия в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margareta von Geldern nació en 1290, en Zutphen, Gelderland, Países Bajos, su papá, Rainald I von Geldern, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Flandres, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Dietrich IX. von Kleve en 1308. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de junio de 1333, en Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, a la edad de 43 años.
